DURGA YANTRA
84
Aghori.it

Mantra
oṁ aiṃ hrīṃ klīṃ cāmuṇḍāyai vicce
sarva maṃgala māṃgalye śive sarvārtha sādhike । śaranye
trayambike gaurī nārāyaṇī namostute ॥
jayantī maṅgalā kālī bhadrakālī kapālinī । durgā kṣamā śivā
dhātrī svāhā svadhā namo ̕stu te ॥

Aghori.it
